content: # Best AI Audio Tools for Podcasters in 2026 Podcasting continues to grow, and AI tools are making professional audio production more accessible than ever before! Whether you're just starting out or looking to streamline your workflow, these AI audio tools will help you create better podcasts faster. Explore our complete [[link:/category/Audio|Audio category]] for more tools. --- ## [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]]: Realistic Voice Generation ElevenLabs is the gold standard for realistic voiceovers and voice cloning, perfect for creating intros, ads, or even full episodes with AI voices. ### Key Features for Podcasters - 🎙️ **High-quality voice cloning** — replicate your own voice for consistent intros - 🌍 **Multilingual support** — reach global audiences with native-sounding voices - 🎭 **Emotion control** — adjust tone and delivery for natural-sounding content **Try ElevenLabs Free**: {{AFFILIATE_ELEVENLABS}} --- ## [[link:/tools/79|Descript]]: Audio Editing Like a Document Descript revolutionizes audio editing by letting you edit sound by editing text — remove filler words, rearrange sections, and fix mistakes in seconds! ### Why Podcasters Love It - 📝 **Text-based editing** — edit audio like a Google Doc - 🎤 **AI transcription** — automatic, accurate captions and transcripts - ✂️ **Filler word removal** — clean up episodes in one click **Start Editing with Descript**: https://www.descript.com --- ## Which Tool Should You Choose? | Tool | Best For | Pricing | |------|----------|---------| | ElevenLabs | Voice generation & cloning | Free (limited), $5+/month | | Descript | Audio editing & transcription | Free (limited), $12+/month | Ready to take your podcast to the next level? Try these tools today and see the difference AI makes! --- For more insights, check out our guide: [[link:/blog/best-ai-audio-tools-2026|Best AI Audio Tools in 2026]] **Final CTA**: Start your free trial of ElevenLabs and create amazing voiceovers for your next podcast episode! {{AFFILIATE_ELEVENLABS}}
